use_cases: Display animated hero text with layered shadow depth effects for landing pages
Create attention-grabbing typography for loading states and brand introductions
Add pulsing text animations to marketing pages and promotional banners
Use as animated headers or call-to-action text in web applications
Implement customizable animated text for creative portfolios and showcases
ai_summary: A layered text animation component that creates a depth effect through multiple shadow layers with smooth cubic-bezier easing. The animation pulses text between transparent and opaque states while offsetting the shadow layers for a 3D-like appearance. Fully customizable via props for text content, color, size, and animation duration. Designed for full-viewport display with responsive sizing using viewport-relative units. Ideal for hero sections, loading screens, and creating visual impact with bold animated typography.
